claims.claimText: Distal Biceps Tendon Rupture pathoanatomy centers on distal-biceps-tendon, radial-nerve, elbow-joint and related stabilizers.

metadata.claim_text: Distal Biceps Tendon Rupture pathoanatomy centers on distal-biceps-tendon, radial-nerve, elbow-joint and related stabilizers.

claims.claimText: Students often underweight exam findings and over-rely on imaging when evaluating distal biceps tendon rupture.

metadata.claim_text: Students often underweight exam findings and over-rely on imaging when evaluating distal biceps tendon rupture.

claims.claimText: State mechanism, key exam findings, imaging role, treatment concept, and return-to-play framework for distal biceps tendon rupture.

metadata.claim_text: State mechanism, key exam findings, imaging role, treatment concept, and return-to-play framework for distal biceps tendon rupture.

claims.claimText: Do not anchor on a single exam maneuver for distal biceps tendon rupture — integrate mechanism, instability symptoms, and imaging pattern.

metadata.claim_text: Do not anchor on a single exam maneuver for distal biceps tendon rupture — integrate mechanism, instability symptoms, and imaging pattern.

claims.claimText: Hook test loss and ecchymosis over the antecubital fossa support distal biceps rupture.

metadata.claim_text: Hook test loss and ecchymosis over the antecubital fossa support distal biceps rupture.

claims.claimText: Distal biceps rupture causes weakness and hook test abnormality; early repair preserves supination strength.

metadata.claim_text: Distal biceps rupture causes weakness and hook test abnormality; early repair preserves supination strength.

claims.claimText: Rehabilitation milestones and return-to-play criteria for distal biceps tendon rupture require attending-defined progression gates.

metadata.claim_text: Rehabilitation milestones and return-to-play criteria for distal biceps tendon rupture require attending-defined progression gates.

decisionPoints.trigger: Active athlete with functional instability or mechanical symptoms from distal biceps tendon rupture despite appropriate initial management
decisionPoints.action: Discuss operative reconstruction versus continued rehabilitation; graft selection and fixation are attending decisions

decisionPoints.trigger: Athlete approaching return-to-sport after distal biceps tendon rupture treatment
decisionPoints.action: Apply sport-specific return-to-play criteria with strength, stability, and functional testing milestones
